seedance_tasks.prompt:
Generate a 3-second realistic TikTok-style ecommerce product demo clip.
Start from the provided storyboard image.
Action: hands touch the white elastic rim -> hands stretch the rim outward with visible tension -> cover moves toward the bowl edge.
Camera: top_down_45, close_up, slight_push_in.
Scene: kitchen_tabletop, clean_bright_table.
Product must keep: transparent film texture, white elastic rim, round flexible shape.
Avoid: do_not_turn_into_plastic_bag, do_not_become_rigid_lid, do_not_remove_elastic_rim.
Keep reference logic: single clear action, fast pacing.
Change from reference: exact wording, background, music, brand elements.
Do not show a visible face, watermark, logo, unrelated objects, or original brand elements.
seedance_tasks.negative_prompt: no visible face, no watermark, no logo, no copied brand elements, do_not_turn_into_plastic_bag, do_not_become_rigid_lid, do_not_remove_elastic_rim, rigid_pressing, overstretching

motion.start_state: hands touch the white elastic rim
motion.main_motion: hands stretch the rim outward with visible tension
motion.end_state: cover moves toward the bowl edge

fallback.fallback_prompt_patch: Use the declared low-risk fallback action.

seedance_tasks.prompt:
Generate a 3-second realistic TikTok-style ecommerce product demo clip.
Start from the provided storyboard image.

motion.main_motion: camera slowly pushes in
